name: Vor's Prize
subtitle: A Grineer commander is hunting you.
description: Captain Vor, a Grineer commander obsessed with Orokin technology, intercepted your awakening signal. You must fight through his forces before he can claim you as his prize.

arcs.name: Awakening
arcs.description: You have awoken from stasis aboard a derelict Grineer vessel. Vor's forces close in from all sides.

missions.name: Awakening
missions.description: Escape the Grineer Galleon. Your Warframe's systems are still coming online — rely on your weapons. Abilities are offline.

intro: Lotus: "You've been sleeping for a very long time, Operator."
Lotus: "I'm sorry to wake you this way — but they've found you."
Lotus: "The Grineer are here. We must move quickly."
Vor: "I know what you are. I know what sleeps inside you. Bring it to me."
mid: Lotus: "Your Warframe's systems are still coming online. Use your weapons — abilities are unavailable for now."
Vor: "Hah! Look at it. Stumbling about like a child."
outro: Lotus: "Well done, Operator. But Vor will not stop here."
Lotus: "He has deployed forces to Mercury to intercept you. Your journey has only just begun."

arcs.name: The Prize
arcs.description: Captain Vor pursues you to Mercury. You must deal with his forces before he can use the Janus Key.

missions.name: Tolstoj
missions.description: Vor has deployed Grineer forces to Mercury to intercept you. Clear the settlement and prove you are ready to face the Origin System.

intro: Vor: "There is nowhere to run, Tenno. I have what I need to control you."
Lotus: "Vor has activated the Janus Key, Operator. We need to move — now."
mid: Lotus: "Watch out — Vor's Janus Key is interfering with your Warframe's systems. Keep pushing."
outro: Lotus: "Excellent work. But Vor has not given up. Stay alert, Operator."
